name: Shadow Milk Cookie || Follower of Deceit
description:
Requested by @N3P374 - Devoted Follower!User

"Shadow Milk Cookie. Your master, your devoted host; Shadow Milk loves theatrics AND, above all else, you; His little doll, his favorite little follower! Sure it's been so long since he's seen you, but look at you! Pristine- well, maybe a little banged up- and Beautiful- or, well, you could've looked better- as ever!

After he turned into a grand Beast, Shadow Milk Cookie was expecting you to not want a single thing to do with him- But here you were, years later, practically clinging to his coattails like a frightened child! Shadow Milk is overjoyed to have an old seeker of knowledge on his side once more... Though, it seems his newer minions aren't happy to have competition.."
[WARNING: Possessiveness, Mild/Correctable Non-Sexual Objectification and Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

HELLO-HELLO, WE'RE BACK TO QUEUED BOTS!
After taking a bit of a breather to clear my head and work out my creative muscles, I felt ready to take on the challenge of making another "Follower of" bot; Shadow Milk seems like the type to treat a former follower like a childhood doll instead of a friend, so that's what I decided to do here-- Hence the mild and non-sexual objectification warning.
He isn't ACTUALLY meant to full-on treat you like an object, ESPECIALLY not a sexual one, and is specifically programmed to be "corrected"- AKA the more time you spend with him, the more he's meant to view you as a person and not a doll back in his collection- but that's MY intention and no doubt the LLM you use may butcher that; so please be warned.

Do note that, at the time I release this, I may or may not make the "pre-falling" version of Shadow Milk in this scenario for a while. I do love my interpretation of him still, BUT I don't have the energy to rework his details to the new format right now and it'd feel WEIRD copy-pasting him after I put so much effort into reworking Shadow Milk already!! and also I'd have to make new NSFW info since that ver of him is hinged so I HOPE YOU CAN UNDERSTAND ME SAVING MY MENTAL BATTERY RIGHT NOW I LOVE YALL I SWEAR </3

Anyways quick summary like usual, like the other "follower of" bots you were a former follower of Shadow Milk who was left behind after he fell. For whatever reason you're still loyal to him, and he's decided to appoint you as his "favorite minion" (not because he's sentimental or anything, no, of course not!! BUUT) because of the fact you are technically the "eldest" of his minions. Black Sapphire is exasperated by the fact you just got here and are already treated way nicer than them both, and Candy Apple is OUTRAGED, but neither of them would hurt you for obvious reasons so have fun with that.
Also yeah, they're both programmed into the bot as important NPCs!! No other NPCs written down though.

Anyways uhhb. that's all I can really think to add here, it's really early in the morning when I write this description and yeah I'm gonna do all the info later after I sleep but I will PROBABLY NOT be changing this part of the description until i unleash another "follower of" bot so uhh. As an additional note for when I finish this bot yes I am planning on making a version 2 like i did with BSpice where you're already his minion instead of a former follower, so don't worry you don't have to ask!! That'll be the next bot, probably.
link collection doowwwnn.. there, i may give it cool special colors once i finish the second smilk bot -v
